failedAssertions.reason: E2E Playwright test product-lifecycle fails: dashboard product creation form sends category values in kebab-case (e.g. 'leather-goods') but API Zod schema expects title-case enum ('Leather Goods'). Unit tests all pass (184/184). 1/2 e2e tests fail.

orchestratorOverride.reason: VAL-CROSS-001 failure is caused by a dashboard category enum mismatch (not an infra issue). Assertion moved from cross-area-regression-check (infra-hardening) to fix-dashboard-category-enum (misc-hardening-fixes). Will be re-validated in that milestone.
